text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 25 

CONTRACT_ID_15 (previous year) 

LABEL: Contract Identifier for Previous Year 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the unique number CMS assigns to each contract that a plan has with CMS. This was 
the contract ID for the plan in 2015. It may or may not be the same as the contract ID in the reference 
year (2016). 

This field is a key that links the plan sponsor's contract
